profile.name: Carter Lim
highlights: Shipped VocaView solo in ~1 month; grew visitors +150% and page views +400% in 2 months
Built deadline-critical Stripe+Firebase payment flow in 2 days for Spread Goodness conference launch
Improved Campus Compass recommendation accuracy from ~65% to ~90% (similarity + data pipeline work)
Reduced Sharetea inventory operation time by ~90% through automation
Launched Mustang Market in 2 weeks and reached 600+ users in first week

experiences.name: VocaView
experiences.what_built: AI-powered language-learning SaaS + Chrome extension; designed site and animations; shipped solo in ~1 month
experiences.impact: 150+ visitors and 10+ users in first week; visitors +150% and page views +400% in first 2 months; reduced API calls ~50% via local machine IP optimization

experiences.name: Spread Goodness
experiences.what_built: Implemented Stripe+Firebase payment system in 2 days before education conference; Google login; forms-to-Sheets tracking; UI updates; analytics dashboard optimization
experiences.impact: Enabled conference-ready payment flow under deadline; automated post-payment user updates

experiences.name: CodeBox
experiences.what_built: Notesharer app; implemented login/onboarding, Supabase-backed save system, and multiple UI flows
experiences.impact: Core auth/storage flows delivered for year-long club project

experiences.name: Campus Compass (Cal Poly)
experiences.what_built: Frontend UI/logic, test weight storage in Supabase, cosine scoring support; weekly task execution
experiences.impact: Contributed to recommendation quality improvements and test infrastructure

experiences.name: Sharetea
experiences.what_built: Google Sheets + Google cloud automation for daily/monthly/yearly sheet creation; dual employee/employer privacy views; usage/provenance tracking; trend prediction
experiences.impact: Reduced inventory operation time ~90% with low-friction workflow

experiences.name: ARC Results
experiences.what_built: Marketing campaigns and student tutoring support
experiences.impact: Supported campaign execution and student outcomes

experiences.name: Mustang Market
experiences.what_built: Student marketplace MVP; Firebase storage/cloud functions/webhooks/image pipeline
experiences.impact: Built in 2 weeks (team of 3); reached 600+ users in first week via social + in-person outreach
